mainEntity.name: What is a algorithmic stablecoin de-peg monitor?

acceptedAnswer.text: A free interactive tool that helps traders and analysts use the algorithmic stablecoin de-peg monitor in real time, incorporating alertas de colapso de paridad for accurate results.

mainEntity.name: Is this tool free to use?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, completely free — no account, no credit card, no limits. The tool runs 100% in your browser.

mainEntity.name: How often is the data updated?

acceptedAnswer.text: Calculations update instantly as you change inputs. For market-linked data, we pull from public APIs on page load.

mainEntity.name: What makes this tool different from generic calculators?

acceptedAnswer.text: This tool incorporates alertas de colapso de paridad, which most generic calculators ignore, giving you significantly more accurate projections.
